markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Train growthx.ai on Fieldguide's HubSpot blog publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publish to the "Resource Articles" blog first.** This is the dedicated library for growthx.ai content.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Use the two-step publishing process:** 1) Publish the article in the blog editor, then 2) add a row to the "resources" HubDB table to populate the main library cards.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Follow strict formatting rules:** Use "Deirdre Dolan" as the author, apply the correct sequential "Abstract" featured image, and insert a "Read More" separator after the first paragraph.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Open all links in new tabs** to keep users on the article page, except for final, explicit CTAs (e.g., "Request a Demo").](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Access

  - [**Problem:** Sulaman cannot log in due to a multi-factor authentication (MFA) issue.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Robert (Fieldguide IT) is working on a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [**Permissions:** Sara confirmed Sulaman has the necessary access for the blog and HubDB.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

### Step 1: Create the Blog Post

  - [**Location:** `Content > Blog`. Select the "Resource Articles" blog from the dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Content Formatting:**](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**Source:** Paste content into a plain-text editor first to strip hidden formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**Tables:** Copy-paste works cleanly.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Headings:** Reapply manually. Use `H2` for main sections and `H3` for sub-sections, referencing existing posts for the style guide.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Fonts:** The template automatically applies the correct font ("Inter").](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [**Required Metadata (`Settings` gear icon):**](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**URL Slug:** Create an SEO-friendly URL.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Author:** Select "Deirdre Dolan" as the corporate face.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Featured Image:** Use the next image in the "Abstract" series (purple, green, yellow, blue, pink).](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**In-Post Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**"Read More" Separator:** Insert after the first paragraph (`Insert > Read More Separator`) to create the preview text for search results.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Links:** Open in a new tab by default to keep users on the article page.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
          - [**Exception:** Final, explicit CTAs (e.g., "Request a Demo") can redirect in the same tab.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

### Step 2: Add to HubDB

  - [**Purpose:** Populates the article cards in the main "Resource Library" section of the website.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Location:** `HubDB > resources`.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
    1.  [Click `Add Row`.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
    2.  [Enter the blog title.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
    3.  [Upload the same "Abstract" image used in the blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
    4.  [Add the meta description.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
    5.  [Paste the live article URL.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
    6.  [Publish the HubDB row.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Previewing & Support

  - [**Article Preview:** The `Preview` button generates a shareable link.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**HubDB Preview:** Not available; the table is a raw data backend.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Support:** Sara is available via Slack until Friday. For general HubSpot questions, use the platform's knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sulaman:**](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [Gain HubSpot access once the IT issue is resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
      - [Publish the next article using the two-step workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
        1.  [Create and publish the post in the "Resource Articles" blog.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
        2.  [Add a row to the "resources" HubDB table.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Robert (Fieldguide IT):**](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
      - [Resolve Sulaman's HubSpot login issue.](https://fathom.video/share/LKLunfzsoJUYjuP-LquhSY6SA_uMjuNo?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
